name: Identify Visible Error Banner
description: Given a screenshot, determine whether a visible error or alert banner is present and describe its content. Tests the model's ability to detect error state indicators without hallucinating on clean UIs.

input.prompt: Analyze this screenshot. Is there a visible error banner, alert, or notification at the top of the screen? If yes, describe what it says and where it appears. If no, say so explicitly.

scripted_response.answer: Yes, there is a visible red error banner at the top of the screen. It spans the full width and is displayed prominently in the header area, indicating an error or alert state.
